DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF FATIMA BONILLA'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF DEFENDANT'S PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE; (PER ORDER FILED 2/7/18). MOTION IS HEARD VIA TELEPHONE CONFERENCE AT THE OFFICE OF JUDGE PRO TEM STEVEN STEIN. THE TELEPHONIC HEARING SCHEDULED FOR AUGUST 28, 2018 WAS INSTEAD HELD ON AUGUST 29, 2018 BECAUSE OF A PHONE SYSTEM FAILURE THE PREVIOUS DAY. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION TO COMPEL A PMK DEPOSITION OF THE DEFENDANT WITH MODIFICATION OF THE VARIOUS CATEGORIES OF INQUIRY AND PHASING OF THE DATES OF QUESTIONING. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER AND THE PARTIES SHALL MEET AND CONFER REGARDING THE FINAL LANGUAGE OF THE ORDER. THE FINAL VERSION OF THE AGREED ORDER OR THE PARTIES' RESPECTIVE PROPOSED VERSIONS OF THE ORDER SHALL BE PRESENTED TO THE COURT ON OR BEFORE 4:00 PM ON AUGUST 31, 2018. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
